# crates/attractor-cli/src

Binary entry point and command implementations for the `pas` CLI. `main.rs` dispatches subcommands (`run`, `validate`, `info`, `plan`, `decompose`, `scaffold`, `generate`, `launch`) to handler functions in the `commands/` module, which delegate to `attractor-pipeline` for graph parsing/validation and shell out to the `claude` CLI for LLM interactions.

## Contents

[main.rs](./main.rs) ‚Äî Binary entry point. `load_pipeline` reads `.dot` files via `attractor_dot::parse`. `Cli` struct with `verbose` global flag and `Commands` enum. Initializes `tracing_subscriber` (debug if `--verbose`, else info).

[commands/mod.rs](./commands/mod.rs) ‚Äî Barrel re-export for all command handlers.

[commands/run.rs](./commands/run.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_run` executes single `.dot` pipeline; `cmd_run_dir` batch-executes with `RunManifest` cross-file resume at `.pas/logs/<stem>-batch-<8hex>/manifest.json`. Uses checkpoint files and `max_budget_usd`/`max_steps`/`*.cost_usd` context keys.

[commands/launch.rs](./commands/launch.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_launch` orchestrates `generate‚Üívalidate‚Üírun` in one command. Validates all pipelines before execution; aborts on `[FAIL]` or parse errors.

[commands/validate.rs](./commands/validate.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_validate` loads pipeline and runs `attractor_pipeline::validate`. Exits `1` on any `Severity::Error` diagnostic.

[commands/generate.rs](./commands/generate.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_generate` reads spec+optional PRD, calls Claude CLI, extracts DOT via `extract_digraph`, writes to `pipelines/{stem}.dot`. `cmd_generate_dir` batch-generates from `*-spec.md` files.

[commands/generate.rs.bak](./commands/generate.rs.bak) ‚Äî Backup of generate.rs.

[commands/plan.rs](./commands/plan.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_plan` scaffolds PRD/spec documents using `templates/prd-template.md` and `templates/spec-template.md` via `claude -p <prompt> --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence`.

[commands/scaffold.rs](./commands/scaffold.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_scaffold` fetches bd epic ID via `bd show --json`, replaces `goal="..."` in `templates/epic-runner.dot`, writes to `pipelines/{epic_id}.dot`.

[commands/decompose.rs](./commands/decompose.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_decompose` reads spec, calls Claude CLI with JSON prompt, parses `DecomposeOutput`, creates tickets via `bd create`, adds dependencies via `bd dep add`.

[commands/info.rs](./commands/info.rs) ‚Äî `cmd_info` displays node/edge counts, start/exit nodes, and full node list with shape/type.

## Subdirectories

[commands/](./commands/) ‚Äî All CLI command handlers. See commands/AGENTS.md for full documentation.

## Command Routing

| Command | Handler |
|---|---|
| `run` (file) | `cmd_run(&pipeline, workdir, logs, dry_run, max_budget_usd, max_steps, fresh)` |
| `run` (dir) | `cmd_run_dir(&pipeline, workdir, dry_run, max_budget_usd, max_steps, fresh)` |
| `validate` | `cmd_validate(&pipeline)` |
| `info` | `cmd_info(&pipeline)` |
| `plan` | `cmd_plan(prd, spec, from_prompt, output)` |
| `decompose` | `cmd_decompose(&spec_path, dry_run)` or `validate_decomposition(&spec_content, epic_id)` |
| `scaffold` | `cmd_scaffold(&epic_id, output)` |
| `generate` (dir) | `cmd_generate_dir(&files[0], output, verbose)` |
| `generate` (file) | `cmd_generate(resolved_prd, &resolved_spec, output, verbose)` |
| `launch` | `cmd_launch(docs_dir, output, workdir, dry_run, max_budget_usd, max_steps, fresh, verbose)` |

## Key Defaults

- `max_steps`: `200` (both `run` and `launch`)
- `logs` default: `.pas/logs/<pipeline>-<hash>` (single-file `run` only)

## Integration Map

| External Crate/Binary | Source | Used By |
|---|---|---|
| `attractor_pipeline::validate` | `crates/attractor-pipeline/src/validation.rs` | generate.rs, launch.rs, validate.rs, scaffold.rs |
| `crate::load_pipeline` | `crates/attractor-cli/src/lib.rs` | info.rs, launch.rs, scaffold.rs, validate.rs |
| `bd` CLI | system binary | decompose.rs, scaffold.rs |
| `claude` CLI | system binary | decompose.rs, generate.rs, plan.rs |
